tothhi__operator_household_income.name: Total operator household income (HHI)
tothhi__operator_household_income.description: Total income for the farm operator household consists of income from the farm business, income from other farming activities, and income from earned and unearned off-farm sources.

farmhhi__operator_household_income.name: Total operator household income from farming activities
farmhhi__operator_household_income.description: Total income for the farm operator household consists of income from the farm business, income from other farming activities, and income from earned and unearned off-farm sources.

totofi__operator_household_income.name: Total operator household income from off-farm sources
totofi__operator_household_income.description: Off-farm income can be classified as earned or unearned. Earned income sources are those that require a household member to allocate their labor or management time to the activity. This includes wages and salaries and off-farm self-employment income. Unearned income sources are passive or transfer income, such as from interest, dividends, private pensions, Social Security, veterans' benefits, and other public programs.

fmhhtot__operator_household_income.name: Percent of U.S. average household income
fmhhtot__operator_household_income.description: Farm operator household income as a percentage of the U.S. Census Bureau's measure for all U.S. households (http://www.census.gov/cps/).

agi__operator_household_income.name: Estimated Adjusted Gross Income (AGI)
agi__operator_household_income.description: For 2003 - present, Estimated AGI is calculated as total income for the farm operator household less adjustments to household income including any self-employment health insurance deductions, retirement contribution deductions, and deductions for half of the self-employment tax, using data from the ARMS. For 1996-2002, the same calculation is used except that self-employment health insurance deductions and retirement contribution deductions are not included due to a lack of relevant data. See Williamson and Bawa at https://www.ers.usda.gov/publications/pub-details/?pubid=95009.

pcepi__operator_household_income.name: PCE price index
pcepi__operator_household_income.description: The Personal Consumption Expenditures price index is maintained by the Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) and measures price change from the perspective of consumers.
